evidence: "Great flick. One of the best classic suspense films ever."
"Terrific film noir. Great light and cinematography."
"...nonstop action and horrible forgettable characters and stupid plots."
"...the pacing is just too fast...they fit the entire novel into an hr and 46 mins..."
"...the action scenes toward the end were great."
"...the score by Lorne Balfe might just be the best MI score yet."
"...the flawless acting...beautiful cinematography and breathtaking score..."
"...Tom has a couple more Mission films left in him."
"...if you're a Claude Rains fan like me you will most certainly enjoy him in this role."
"...the score by Lorne Balfe might just be the best MI score yet."
"...never has a film moved me emotionally as much as this..."
"...if not for Gone With the Wind this movie probably would have brought home the oscar..."

summary: The user enjoys action and suspense films with high production quality and emotional depth. They prefer fast-paced narratives but express disappointment with overly simplistic plots. While they appreciate strong performances and cinematography, they show low loyalty to specific creators.
